job_summary: A Site CRA works directly at the clinical trial site (hospital/research center), ensuring that studies are conducted according to protocol, regulatory standards, and sponsor requirements.
key_responsibilities: Coordinate daily clinical trial activities at the site
Ensure protocol adherence and patient safety
Maintain site documentation (ISF – Investigator Site File)
Ensure compliance with Good Clinical Practice
skills_required: coordinate daily clinical trial activities at the site
ensure protocol adherence and patient safety
maintain site documentation (isf – investigator site file)
